etymology.description: 同(同) (tóng, "same") + 事(事) (shì, "business; affair; work") = people engaged in the same work or business -> colleague
etymology.interpretation: A 同事(同事) (tóngshì, "colleague") is someone who shares the same work environment or responsibilities, highlighting the companionship and cooperation in professional settings.

examples.chinese: 我的同事今天在开会(我的同事今天在開會)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ de tóngshì jīntiān zài kāihuì.
examples.english: My colleague is attending a meeting today.

examples.chinese: 我们常常和同事一起吃午餐(我們常常和同事一起吃午餐)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen chángcháng hé tóngshì yīqǐ chī wǔcān.
examples.english: We often have lunch together with colleagues.

examples.chinese: 他是我最喜欢的同事(他是我最喜歡的同事)。
examples.pinyin: Tā shì wǒ zuì xǐhuān de tóngshì.
